sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Procore Technologies appoints Ronald Hovsepian to board following resignation By Investing.com
feed.summary: Procore Technologies (NYSE: PCOR) has announced the appointment of Ronald Hovsepian to its board of directors, effective Tuesday, following the voluntary resignation of Brian Feinstein. Mr. Hovsepian will serve as a Class I director until the 2028 annual meeting of stockholders and has also been appointed to the Compensation and Nominating Committees. This appointment comes as the company reports strong third-quarter financial results and positive outlooks from analysts.

feed.title: Lemonade’s Market Prospects soar with Analyst’s Price Target Boost
feed.summary: Lemonade Inc. stock saw a 6.42% increase following an analyst's price target boost and increased investor sentiment. JMP analyst Matthew Carletti raised the price target for Lemonade, citing projected market share increase and sustainable growth, while Morgan Stanley maintains a more cautious short-term outlook. The company is actively engaging with market players through virtual meetings and upcoming discussions hosted by Oppenheimer, aiming to enhance investor confidence and pivot towards sustainable expansion.

feed.title: Lemonade COO Eckstein sells $642k in stock
feed.summary: Adina Eckstein, COO of Lemonade, Inc. (NYSE:LMND), sold 7,919 shares of company stock for $642,626 on December 10, 2025, through a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. This sale leaves her with 196,310 directly owned shares. The transaction follows Lemonade's strong Q3 2025 earnings, which saw EPS and revenue exceed expectations, leading to mixed analyst price target adjustments.

feed.title: Verisk Analytics: A Strategic Move Meets Market Doubt
feed.summary: Verisk Analytics is facing market pressure due to its stock's weak performance, despite a strategic expansion into cybersecurity insurance and strong financial health. The market seems cautious about the profitability timeline of new technology integrations, and institutional investors show mixed signals, with some trimming and others increasing their positions. Analysts maintain a "Hold" rating with cautious optimism, awaiting clearer signals of accelerated revenue growth from the company's cyber risk initiatives.

feed.title: West to Participate in Upcoming Investor Conference
feed.summary: West Pharmaceutical Services, Inc. announced it will present at the J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference on January 14, 2026, at 9:00 am PST. A live webcast and subsequent replay will be available on the Investors section of the Company's website. West is a global leader in innovative solutions for injectable drug administration, providing critical support to drug developers worldwide.

feed.title: West Pharmaceutical Services (NYSE: WST) to present at J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference
feed.summary: West Pharmaceutical Services (NYSE: WST) will present at the J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference on Wednesday, January 14, 2026, at 9:00 am PST in San Francisco. A live webcast will be available in the Investors section of the company's website, with a replay accessible for approximately 90 days after the event. The company is a global leader in innovative solutions for injectable drug administration, headquartered in Exton, Pennsylvania.

feed.title: Mizuho downgrades Valero Energy stock rating to Neutral on refining outlook
feed.summary: Mizuho has downgraded Valero Energy (NYSE:VLO) from Outperform to Neutral while maintaining a price target of $192.00, citing its above-peer valuation and a potential for weaker refining cracks in 2026. Other recent analyst actions on Valero include downgrades to Neutral and reiterations of Buy and Overweight ratings, alongside an announcement of a new CFO effective January 1, 2026.

feed.title: Recent Pullback Provides Opportunity In Southern Company (NYSE:SO)
feed.summary: The Southern Company (SO) is rated a Buy after a 15% pullback, offering a stable utility with multiple growth catalysts. SO projects 5–7% annual EPS growth, supported by 8% regulated rate base and electric load growth, with 90% of earnings from regulated utilities. The company’s $76 billion capital plan is 77% equity-funded, and it is expected to become a Dividend Aristocrat in 2025, attracting further investment.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase increases stake in PRS REIT to over 7.5%

This increased position, primarily held through J.P. Morgan Securities plc, comprises both direct shares and financial instruments like cash-settled equity swaps. The PRS REIT PLC trades on the London Stock Exchange and focuses on investments in the UK private rented sector housing market.

feed.title: Goldman’s Snider Sees AI, Strong Macro Driving 12% Earnings Jump
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs strategists, led by Ben Snider, predict US stocks will reach new highs next year, driven by increased AI adoption and resilient economic growth. They project a substantial 12% jump in S&P 500 earnings per share for the next year, with AI contributing significantly to these gains. This optimistic outlook suggests a strong market performance fueled by technological advancements and a robust macro environment.
